mapper.sql: id, user_id, client_no, name, gender, age, birth_date, contact_phone, emergency_contact, emergency_phone, start_date, end_date, status, diagnosis, treatment_plan, remark, tags, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_client ( user_id, client_no, name, gender, age, birth_date, contact_phone, emergency_contact, emergency_phone, start_date, end_date, status, diagnosis, treatment_plan, remark, tags, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{clientNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{age, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{birthDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{contactPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emergencyContact, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emergencyPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{endDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{status, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{diagnosis, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{treatmentPlan, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tags, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_client WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_client ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM t_client WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM t_client WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND ( name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') OR client_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') OR diagnosis LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%') ) ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_client WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT c., FROM t_client c WHERE c.id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT c., FROM t_client c WHERE c.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_client ( user_id, client_no, name, gender, age, birth_date, contact_phone, emergency_contact, emergency_phone, start_date, end_date, status, diagnosis, treatment_plan, remark, tags, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.clientNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.gender, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.age, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.birthDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.contactPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.emergencyContact, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.emergencyPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.startDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.endDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.status, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.diagnosis, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.treatmentPlan, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tags, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM t_client WHERE id IN
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_client WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 1 AND start_date <= #{date, jdbcType=DATE}
AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date > #{date, jdbcType=DATE})
ORDER BY start_date DESC
